summary: Lead accepts M7-BETA-CULTURE-REVIEW-001 after independent QA ACCEPT. The task is accepted only as Beta culture/history/language review evidence, not formal content lock acceptance, and preserves all Human Gate boundaries including major cultural-risk decisions and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE.

tests_run.result: Content validation passed; M7 beta manifest hash remained 92aed91e.
No whitespace errors in lead-side verification before acceptance.

decisions.decision: Accept the Beta culture/history/language review evidence for integration after QA ACCEPT.
This task does not accept formal M7 content lock; formal content lock remains the future M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 Human Gate.
The product-owner UI/localization/art directive is preserved as future M7 quality-track guidance and dependency evidence, not implementation authorization.
Manual node battle remains deferred from 1.0 mainline and does not become a M7/M8 blocker.

risks.summary: Formal content lock and major cultural-risk decisions still require Human Gate approval.
Visual/UX handoff has systems ACCEPT but independent QA is still pending; it must be reconciled before downstream UI/localization implementation tasks are created or updated.

requested_action: Commit, push, open/merge PR after all active branch review work is accepted, then close M7-BETA-CULTURE-REVIEW-001 only after the accepted commit enters main.
